drain_assessment.notes: No Penrose drain visible in demonstration video

confidence_rationale: This appears to be an instructional demonstration video rather than a scored FLS task performance. No Penrose drain with marked suture points visible, no actual task completion measurable.
cannot_determine: Actual task performance vs instructional demonstration
Suture placement accuracy on marked Penrose drain
Precise timing of actual task phases
Specific penalties related to mark deviation
Whether this represents a complete FLS Task 4 attempt
technique_summary: Video shows instructional demonstration of extracorporeal knot tying techniques rather than a scored FLS Task 4 performance. Clean technique demonstrated for educational purposes.
strengths: Clear demonstration of extracorporeal knot formation
improvement_suggestions: This appears to be instructional material rather than a performance to be scored
